name: voice-room-desktop
description: Electron desktop shell for Voice Room.

scripts.check: node --check electron/main.js && node --check electron/preload.js && node --check electron/renderer-recovery.js && node --check electron/screen-picker-preload.js && node --check electron/screen-picker.js && node --check electron/native-audio.js && node --check electron/native-capture-contract.js && node --check electron/native-capture.js && node --check electron/native-capture-frames.js && node --check electron/native-capture-relay.js && node --check electron/native-capture-policy.js && node --check electron/windows-capture-policy.js && node --check electron/window-lifecycle-policy.js && node --check electron/window-lifecycle.js && node --check electron/desktop-capture-policy.js && node --check electron/media-device-policy.js && node --check electron/update-gate.js && node --check electron/update-gate-policy.js && node --check electron/update-preload.js && node --check electron/update-splash.js && node --check electron/logger.js && node --check electron/shell-theme.js && node --check scripts/build-electron.js && node --check scripts/build-native-audio.js && node --check scripts/build-native-capture.js && node --check scripts/capture-picker-preview.js && node --check scripts/clean-dist.js && node --check scripts/create-electron-config.js && node --check scripts/validate-release-version.js && node --check scripts/windows-tray-smoke.js && node --check electron-builder.config.js
scripts.desktop: node scripts/create-electron-config.js && npm run native:build && electron .
